headline: NRG Energy Bets On AI PowerOS As Valuation Lags Analyst Targets
summary: NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) has entered into an agreement with Equilibrium Energy to deploy PowerOS™, an AI-native operating system, across its portfolio optimization operations. This marks NRG's first publicly announced enterprise AI rollout in portfolio operations and signals a new phase in its digital and operational approach. The partnership focuses on using AI tools to manage and optimize power market decisions across NRG's portfolio. NRG Energy, a large U.S. power and retail electricity...
